direct_manipulation_rows_schema.description: Exchange, venue, chain, or data source.
wash_trade, spoofing, layering, pump_dump, quote_stuffing, stop_run, liquidity_raid, or other direct class.
For negatives: same asset/venue/time controls or documented non-event controls.
Public URL, authenticated export id, or private handoff reference.

next_action: Fill the v3 request CSV with an exact-underlying independent parent-root label panel, or provide authenticated direct Manipulation positive/negative rows following the schema.
objective: External acquisition request for the remaining parent-root label slots and direct Manipulation rows.

parent_root_panel_schema.description: Target provider lane such as yfinance or kraken_public_lowpollution_http.
Exact requested instrument/underlying, not a near proxy.
Inclusive timestamp/date for the label window, with timezone.
Exclusive or inclusive end timestamp/date for the label window; convention must be documented.
One of Bull, Bear, Sideways, Crisis.
Independent source-backed/manual/official label provenance; not HMM/GMM/OHLCV/future-return/proxy output.
Public URL, authenticated export id, or private handoff reference.
Optional source confidence/quality metadata; not a substitute for calibration.

reject_rules: Do not use HMM/GMM/cluster IDs as independent labels.
Do not use OHLCV/technical-indicator/Pine-generated labels as parent-root completion labels.
Do not use future-return labels, strategy predictions, or model service outputs as source labels.
Do not use near-underlying proxy labels unless the source explicitly labels the requested instrument.
Do not use document indexes, methodology papers, search surfaces, or credentials alone as accepted evidence.
Do not accept Manipulation from ThinLiquidity/session-liquidity/sweep/volume-ratio proxies.
